title: Apple names insider John Ternus as CEO, Cook to become executive chairman
description: Apple has named John Ternus as its new CEO, replacing Tim Cook who will become executive chairman. Ternus, a longtime insider and key player in the development of major Apple products, will now prioritize enhancing artificial intelligence capabilities. This change in leadership signals a shift towards AI for the company.

title: Who is John Ternus? Know all about Apple's engineer-turned CEO - Age, Net Worth and More
description: Apple Inc. has appointed John Ternus, a seasoned hardware chief, as its next CEO, succeeding Tim Cook who will transition to executive chairman. Ternus, with over two decades at Apple, has been instrumental in developing key products like the iPhone and Mac. This leadership change occurs as the tech giant navigates significant industry shifts driven by artificial intelligence advancements.
